message:
test(readme): Index set operations (intersection/union/difference/symmetric_difference)

Index has 4 set-op methods that mirror pandas Index.{intersection,
union, difference, symmetric_difference} for index alignment / label
comparison. None were covered by integration tests.

Adds readme_index_set_operations — reachable via prelude alone — that
asserts each on partially-overlapping inputs (left={0,1,2,3},
right={2,3,4,5}):

- intersection           → {2, 3}        (length 2)
- union_with             → {0,1,2,3,4,5} (length 6)
- difference (left-right)→ {0, 1}        (length 2)
- symmetric_difference   → {0,1,4,5}     (length 4)

Each result is checked element-wise (contains-based to avoid relying
on a specific output ordering convention).

Closes frankenpandas-fd90.58.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
